mapper.update:
update member
name= #{name},
username= #{username},
phone= #{phone},
gender= #{gender},
card= #{card},
level= #{level},
age= #{age},
create_time= #{createTime},
update_time= #{updateTime},
where id= #{id}

update.foreach:
UPDATE member
name = #{member.name},
username = #{member.username},
age = #{member.age},
gender = #{member.gender},
phone = #{member.phone},
card = #{member.card},
level = #{member.level},
update_time = #{member.updateTime},
WHERE id = #{member.id}

mapper.delete:
delete from member where id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select id, name,username, age, gender, phone, card, level, create_time, update_time from member order by create_time desc
select id, name,username, age, gender, phone, card, level, create_time, update_time from member where id= #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into member(name,username, age, gender, phone, card, level, create_time, update_time) values(#{name},#{username}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{card}, #{level}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
